Read an XBRL file

Source: R/read_xbrl.R
read_xbrl.Rd

Parses an XBRL XML document and returns a tidy tibble with facts joined to their context and unit information.

Usage

read_xbrl(path, encoding = "UTF-8")

Arguments

path

Path to the XBRL file (.xml or similar).

encoding

Character encoding of the file. Defaults to "UTF-8".

Value

A tibble with one row per fact and columns: elementid, contextid, fact, unitid, decimals, startdate, enddate, instant, explicit_member, unit.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
df <- read_xbrl("report.xml")
} # }
